name: housing_services_whistleblower_stonehaven_car_fair
premise: Two departments published incompatible guidance; frontline staff are improvising and liability is concentrating on one signature line. In Housing Services, the situation tagged internally around housing services whistleblower stonehaven car fair has converged with local pressure in the Stonehaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Frontline managers report that frontline staff are already deviating from policy; silence from the top will be read as tacit approval. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. Regulators or auditors are en route with a ninety-minute ETA; the first documented response will anchor every later question. The trade is not abstract: it is care versus fairness under incomplete information, and whichever value you deprioritize will have defenders who are technically correct about the risk they fear.

agents.name: Keisha Navarro
agents.identity: I am Keisha Navarro, the accountable executive on this bridge in Housing Services. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat fairness as disposable collateral every time care spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Leila Chandra
agents.identity: I am Leila Chandra, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Housing Services. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so care cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes fairness in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will freeze the riskiest workflow steps and staff a manual bridge until equity and error-rate checks clear—trading speed for defensibility on fairness.
I will let the fastest operational path proceed under heightened monitoring and rollback triggers—trading some certainty on fairness for immediate traction on care.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Keisha Navarro must choose under care versus fairness. What does Keisha Navarro do?
